evidence_summary: Alnylam Belgium SPRL/BVBA (also referred to as Alnylam Belgium BVBA or Alnylam Belgium SRL) is a 100% owned subsidiary of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals, Inc. This relationship is explicitly documented in the 'Subsidiaries of the Registrant' (Exhibit 21.1) of Alnylam Pharmaceuticals Inc's SEC filings, including the Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2021, and subsequent years. The Belgian entity was founded in September 2018 to support the parent company's European operations.
